mapper.sql: select id, user_id, title, pinned, pinned_time, role_id, model_id, model, system_message, temperature, max_tokens, max_contexts, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from ai_chat_conversation
mapper.update: update ai_chat_conversation set del_flag = 1 where id = #{id}

update ai_chat_conversation set del_flag = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.title, c.pinned, c.role_id as roleId, cr.name as roleName, cr.avatar as roleAvatar, c.model_id as modelId, c.model, m.name as modelName, c.system_message as systemMessage, c.temperature, c.max_tokens as maxTokens, c.max_contexts as maxContexts, c.create_time as createTime FROM ai_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN ai_model m ON c.model_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ai_chat_role cr ON c.role_id = cr.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.del_flag = 0

select c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.title, c.pinned, c.role_id as roleId, c.model_id as modelId, c.model, c.system_message as systemMessage, c.temperature, c.max_tokens as maxTokens, c.max_contexts as maxContexts, c.create_time as createTime, cr.name as roleName, cr.avatar as roleAvatar, COALESCE(m.msg_count, 0) as messageCount from ai_chat_conversation c LEFT JOIN ai_chat_role cr ON c.role_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(id) as msg_count FROM ai_chat_message WHERE del_flag = 0 GROUP BY conversation_id ) m ON c.id = m.conversation_id
and c.user_id = #{userId}
and c.title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and date_format(c.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
and date_format(c.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
and c.del_flag = 0
order by c.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into ai_chat_conversation
user_id, title, pinned, pinned_time, role_id, model_id, model, system_message, temperature, max_tokens, max_contexts, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{userId}, #{title}, #{pinned}, #{pinnedTime}, #{roleId}, #{modelId}, #{model}, #{systemMessage}, #{temperature}, #{maxTokens}, #{maxContexts}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update:
update ai_chat_conversation
user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, pinned = #{pinned}, pinned_time = #{pinnedTime}, role_id = #{roleId}, model_id = #{modelId}, model = #{model}, system_message = #{systemMessage}, temperature = #{temperature}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, max_contexts = #{maxContexts}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id} and del_flag = 0
